fixture triad-reactive-large
identity example:triad-reactive-large 0.1.0
imports
  none
resolved_imports
  none
macro_trace
  applied RootInput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootOutput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Option -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Vec -> KeyValue
  positions RootInput -> EnumVariants -> RootOutput -> EnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> TypeReference
input Input
  SignalIn(SignalRequest)
  NexusIn(NexusRequest)
  SemaIn(SemaRequest)
  Admin(AdminRequest)
  Heartbeat
output Output
  SignalOut(SignalReply)
  NexusOut(NexusReply)
  SemaOut(SemaReply)
  AdminOut(AdminReply)
  Event(RuntimeEvent)
  Rejected(Rejected)
namespace
  newtype CommitSequence = Integer
  newtype DatabaseDigest = Integer
  newtype ActorIdentifier = Text
  newtype SocketPath = Text
  enum SignalRequest
    RecordIntent(RecordIntent)
    ObserveIntent(ObserveIntent)
    SubscribeIntent(SubscribeIntent)
  enum SignalReply
    RecordAccepted(RecordAccepted)
    ObservationReturned(ObservationReturned)
    SubscriptionStarted(SubscriptionStarted)
  enum NexusRequest
    PushSignal(PushSignal)
    PushSemaResult(PushSemaResult)
    ResolveMail
    ExpireMail
  enum NexusReply
    PushedToSema(PushedToSema)
    MailResolved(MailResolved)
    MailExpired
  enum SemaRequest
    WriteEntry(WriteEntry)
    ReadEntries(ReadEntries)
    OpenSubscription(OpenSubscription)
    CloseSubscription(CloseSubscription)
  enum SemaReply
    EntryWritten(EntryWritten)
    EntriesRead(EntriesRead)
    SubscriptionOpened(SubscriptionOpened)
    SubscriptionClosed(SubscriptionClosed)
  enum AdminRequest
    Drain
    Pause
    Resume
    Snapshot(Snapshot)
  enum AdminReply
    Drained
    Paused
    Resumed
    SnapshotReady(SnapshotReady)
  enum RuntimeEvent
    MailSent(MailSent)
    MessageAccepted(MessageAccepted)
    MessageCommitted(MessageCommitted)
    MessageFailed(MessageFailed)
  newtype Rejected = RejectionReason
  enum RejectionReason
    Malformed
    Unauthorized
    Conflict
    Unsupported
    StaleVersion
    InternalError
  struct RecordIntent
    actor_identifier: ActorIdentifier
    entry: Entry
  newtype ObserveIntent = Query
  newtype SubscribeIntent = Query
  struct RecordAccepted
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
  newtype ObservationReturned = RecordSet
  newtype SubscriptionStarted = SubscriptionToken
  newtype PushSignal = SignalRequest
  newtype PushSemaResult = SemaReply
  newtype PushedToSema = SemaRequest
  newtype MailResolved = SignalReply
  newtype WriteEntry = Entry
  newtype ReadEntries = Query
  newtype OpenSubscription = Query
  newtype CloseSubscription = SubscriptionToken
  struct EntryWritten
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
  struct EntriesRead
    record_set: RecordSet
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
  struct SubscriptionOpened
    subscription_token: SubscriptionToken
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
  struct SubscriptionClosed
    subscription_token: SubscriptionToken
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
  newtype Snapshot = SocketPath
  struct SnapshotReady
    socket_path: SocketPath
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
  newtype MailSent = SignalRequest
  newtype MessageAccepted = SignalRequest
  newtype MessageCommitted = CommitSequence
  newtype MessageFailed = RejectionReason
  struct Entry
    topics: Topics
    kind: Kind
    description: Description
    magnitude: Magnitude
    actor_identifier: ActorIdentifier
  newtype Topic = Text
  newtype Topics = Vec<Topic>
  newtype Description = Text
  enum Kind
    Decision
    Principle
    Correction
    Clarification
    Constraint
    Observation
    Question
  enum Magnitude
    Minimum
    VeryLow
    Low
    Medium
    High
    VeryHigh
    Maximum
  struct Query
    topics: Topics
    kinds: Vec<Kind>
    limit: Option<Integer>
  newtype RecordIdentifier = Integer
  newtype SubscriptionToken = Integer
  struct RecordSet
    records: Vec<Entry>
    by_topic: KeyValue<Topic, RecordIdentifier>
